items.name: Mask of the :D
items.description: This mask promised to transform the wearer into a legend, but the curse was pure comedy. It replaced the wearer's face with a ridiculous visage, leading to uncontrollable laughter and endless selfies. Those who dared to wear it were forever known as the "face" of humor.
